state_pressure.basis: June 9 session overlay — rates leading equity; SPX below 1.0σ; WTI at cycle low.

session_context: June 9 session overlay: neutral | stable; rates leading; low confidence, fragile stability; WTI cycle low.

drafts.x:
10Y yield starting to stretch — one more move and the regime flips.
Needs confirmation from the rest of the board — that's when it gets real.

SPX 7,426. 10Y 4.54%. Oil $88.

Invalidation:
• SPX breaks above 7,537 or below 7,314
• 10Y moves beyond 4.74% or below 4.34%

What breaks this range — and which direction?
drafts.substack:
REGIME: Neutral | Diverging
CONFIDENCE: Low (36/100)
RISK TILT: neutral
STABILITY: Fragile

Snapshot — Jun 09, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,425.67   z +0.93
  10Y Yield:      4.544%  z +1.43
  WTI Oil:        87.88   z -1.42

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,426 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from equities. 10Y yield at 4.54% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $88 is depressed relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Confidence is low at 36/100 — the read is fragile and needs more signal before acting on it.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,537 or below 7,314
• 10Y moves beyond 4.74% or below 4.34%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.

regime_analogs.intro: As of June 9, 2026, three closest structural matches for today’s neutral stable regime — rates leading, WTI at cycle low, SPX below 1.0σ. Members search the full 50-year database.

analog_rows.gap: Gap 0.60σ · rates leading · WTI at cycle low
analog_rows.outcome: Regime shifted defensive — SPX broke below 7,314 equivalent within 4 sessions as rates held and oil disinflationary pressure accelerated

analog_rows.gap: Gap 0.60σ · rates leading · WTI at cycle low
analog_rows.outcome: Regime recovered neutral then pro-risk — 10Y pulled back below 1.0σ within 6 sessions, SPX reclaimed 1.0σ and extended

analog_rows.gap: Gap 0.50σ · rates leading · WTI at cycle low
analog_rows.outcome: Gap resolved pro-risk — SPX absorbed rate pressure, reclaimed 1.0σ, oil stayed suppressed and did not drive the regime shift

regime_analogs.context_note: Structural pattern matches only — not predictions. Rates leading + WTI cycle low + SPX below 1.0σ is the defining three-signal condition. Resolution at 7,537 and 4.74%. Historical context.
